<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#1a1a1a"/>

  <!-- Large Red Organic Shape -->
  <path d="M 100 250 C 120 180, 180 150, 250 180 C 320 210, 350 280, 330 350 C 310 420, 250 450, 180 420 C 110 390, 80 320, 100 250 Z" fill="#e74c3c"/>

  <!-- Large Blue Organic Shape -->
  <path d="M 250 100 C 280 70, 350 70, 380 120 C 410 170, 400 240, 360 280 C 320 320, 280 310, 240 270 C 200 230, 200 160, 250 100 Z" fill="#3498db"/>

  <!-- Yellow Jagged Shard 1 -->
  <path d="M 300 50 L 320 80 L 310 100 L 350 120 L 330 150 L 380 160 L 360 130 L 400 100 L 370 70 L 320 50 Z" fill="#f1c40f"/>

  <!-- Yellow Jagged Shard 2 -->
  <path d="M 150 50 L 170 80 L 160 100 L 200 120 L 180 150 L 230 160 L 210 130 L 250 100 L 220 70 L 170 50 Z" fill="#f1c40f"/>

  <!-- Cyan Streaks -->
  <path d="M 100 100 L 150 150 L 130 160 L 180 210 L 160 220 L 210 270" stroke="#1abc9c" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M 400 400 L 350 350 L 370 340 L 320 290 L 340 280 L 290 230" stroke="#1abc9c" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M 50 400 L 100 350 L 80 360 L 130 310 L 110 320 L 160 270" stroke="#1abc9c" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M 450 100 L 400 150 L 420 160 L 370 210 L 390 220 L 340 270" stroke="#1abc9c" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>

  <!-- Scattered White Dots -->
  <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="480" cy="50" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="50" cy="480" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="480" cy="480" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="300" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="400" cy="200" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="100" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="300" cy="400" r="2" fill="white"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
